# Stich MVP Instructions

When working in this repository, if the request says `stich mvp`, `stitch mvp`, `搭 MVP`, or asks to reduce scope to a first shippable version:

- choose one primary persona,
- define one end-to-end golden path,
- cut secondary flows and admin features unless they are mandatory,
- prefer mocked data and explicit replacement points for early delivery,
- make assumptions explicit with `[推断]`,
- finish with the next 3 concrete actions.

Prefer this workflow routing when planning work:

- `s1-idea-validator`
- `s2-prd-drafter`
- `s4a-s5-ui-designer`
- `s4b-s6-backend-architect`
- `s8-expo-rn-frontend`
- `s9-node-backend-dev`
- `s10-api-integration`
- `s11-qa-testing`
- `s12-s14-release`
